attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
PRODUCT_KEY,
BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,
DTL_STS_CD,
PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
DTL_CREATE_DT,
DTL_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
ACTION_CODE ,
DML_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT
	TOT.PRODUCT_KEY,
	TOT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,
	TOT.DTL_STS_CD,
	TOT.PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
	TOT.DTL_CREATE_DT,
	TOT.DTL_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
	TOT.DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
	TOT.DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	TOT.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT,
	COALESCE(MAX(TOT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TOT.PRODUCT_KEY,TOT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT
			ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TOT.PRODUCT_KEY,TOT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD ORDER BY TOT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
	TOT.ACTION_CODE ,
	(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1
		  AND (NCPRPDT.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NCPRPDT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD IS NOT NULL)
		THEN 'U'
		ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		TIN.PRODUCT_KEY,
		TIN.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,
		TIN.DTL_STS_CD,
		TIN.PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
		TIN.DTL_CREATE_DT,
		TIN.DTL_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
		TIN.DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
		TIN.DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
		TIN.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT ,
		TIN.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
		TIN.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.PRODUCT_KEY ,TIN.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,TIN.DTL_STS_CD, TIN.PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
										TIN.DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,TIN.DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY
							ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
		FROM
			(
				SELECT
				NCGP.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
				NICI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,
				COALESCE(SCPBDI.STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS DTL_STS_CD,
				NICC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
				CREATED_DATE AS DTL_CREATE_DT,
				LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DTL_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
				COALESCE(NCWPU.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				COALESCE(NCWPC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				CAST(SCPBDI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS DATE ) START_TV_DT ,
				'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
				SCPBDI.CREATE_DATETIME AS CREATE_DATETIME
				FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PID_BW_DATA_INTF SCPBDI
				INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INVALID_COUNTRY_SPLIT WICS
				ON SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = WICS.PID_BW_DATA_ID
				LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PROBABALE_CO_SPLIT WPCS
				ON SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = WPCS.PID_BW_DATA_ID
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
				ON COALESCE(SCPBDI.PID,'UNKNOWN') = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
				INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_GOODS_PRODUCT NCGP
				ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NCGP.PRODUCT_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICI
				ON CASE WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY IS NULL THEN 'UN'
				WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY = '#' THEN 'UN'
				ELSE WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY END = NICI.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICC
				ON  CASE WHEN WPCS.PROBABALE_CO IS NULL THEN 'UN'
				WHEN WPCS.PROBABALE_CO = '#' THEN 'UN'
				ELSE WPCS.PROBABALE_CO END = NICC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
				LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
				ON (COALESCE(SCPBDI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)
				LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
				ON (COALESCE(SCPBDI.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID)

				UNION ALL
				SELECT
				PRODUCT_KEY,
				BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,
				DTL_STS_CD,
				PROBABLE_COUNTRY_CD,
				DTL_CREATE_DT,
				DTL_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
				DTL_LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				DTL_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
				START_TV_DT,
				'X' AS ACTION_CODE,
				EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS CREATE_DATETIME
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_RL_W_PRDCT_DTL_TV NCPRPDT
				WHERE EXISTS
							(SELECT 1 FROM
										$$STGDB.ST_CO_PID_BW_DATA_INTF SCPBDI
										INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INVALID_COUNTRY_SPLIT WICS
										ON SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = WICS.PID_BW_DATA_ID
										INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
										ON COALESCE(SCPBDI.PID,'UNKNOWN') = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
										INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_GOODS_PRODUCT NCGP
										ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NCGP.PRODUCT_KEY
										INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICI
										ON CASE WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY IS NULL THEN 'UN'
										WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY = '#' THEN 'UN'
										ELSE WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY END = NICI.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE

								WHERE  NCGP.PRODUCT_KEY = NCPRPDT.PRODUCT_KEY
								AND NICI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = NCPRPDT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD
							)
				AND NCPRPDT.END_TV_DT=16000101
			)TIN
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TIN.PRODUCT_KEY,TIN.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD,TIN.START_TV_DT ORDER BY TIN.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
	)TOT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PRJCT_RL_W_PRDCT_DTL_TV NCPRPDT
ON NCPRPDT.PRODUCT_KEY = TOT.PRODUCT_KEY
AND NCPRPDT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD  = TOT.BK_INVALID_COUNTRY_CD
AND NCPRPDT.END_TV_DT = 16000101
WHERE ROW_NUM = 1
) A

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PID_BW_DATA_ID,
PID,
INVALID_COUNTRY,
PROBABALE_CO,
PRODUCT_FAMILY,
BU,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
STATUS,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_PID_BW_DATA_INTF ECPBDI
WHERE ECPBDI.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
				(
					SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PID_BW_DATA_INTF SCPBDI
					WHERE ECPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID
				)

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PID_BW_DATA_ID,
PID,
INVALID_COUNTRY,
PROBABALE_CO,
PRODUCT_FAMILY,
BU,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
STATUS,
'INCR' EXCEPTION_CD,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_PID_BW_DATA_INTF SCPBDI

WHERE NOT EXISTS (
					SELECT 1 FROM
							$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP			
							INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INVALID_COUNTRY_SPLIT WICS
							ON SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = WICS.PID_BW_DATA_ID
							INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PROBABALE_CO_SPLIT WPCS
							ON SCPBDI.PID_BW_DATA_ID = WPCS.PID_BW_DATA_ID							
							INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_GOODS_PRODUCT NCGP
							ON NCGP.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICI
							ON CASE WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY IS NULL THEN 'UN'
							WHEN WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY = '#' THEN 'UN'
							ELSE WICS.INVALID_COUNTRY END = NICI.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICC
							ON  CASE WHEN WPCS.PROBABALE_CO IS NULL THEN 'UN'
							WHEN WPCS.PROBABALE_CO = '#' THEN 'UN'
							ELSE WPCS.PROBABALE_CO END = NICC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPC
							ON (COALESCE(SCPBDI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPC.CEC_ID)
							INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWPU
							ON (COALESCE(SCPBDI.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') = NCWPU.CEC_ID)
					
					WHERE COALESCE(SCPBDI.PID,'UNKNOWN') = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
			)
